title: React developer
description: Looking for the software developer with hands on experinece

title: Backend Developer
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a skilled Backend Developer to join our development team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining scalable server-side applications, APIs, and databases. You will work closely with frontend developers, product managers, and other stakeholders to deliver high-quality software solutions.
requirements:
Required Skills & Qualifications
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
1–4 years of experience in backend development (Freshers with strong projects may also apply).
Strong knowledge of Node.js and Express.js.
Experience with REST APIs and API integration.
Proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript.
Experience with MongoDB, MySQL, or PostgreSQL.
Understanding of JWT Authentication, OAuth, and security practices.
Familiarity with Git and version control systems.
Knowledge of asynchronous programming and event-driven architecture.
Strong problem-solving and debugging skills.

title: Frontend Developer
description:
Position: Frontend Developer
About the Role

We are looking for a talented Frontend Developer to create responsive, user-friendly, and high-performance web applications. The ideal candidate should have strong experience in modern JavaScript frameworks, UI development, and frontend best practices. You will work closely with designers, backend developers, and product teams to deliver exceptional user experiences.
requirements:
Develop responsive and interactive web applications.
Convert UI/UX designs into clean, reusable, and maintainable code.
Build reusable components and frontend libraries.
Integrate frontend applications with RESTful APIs.
Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability.
Ensure cross-browser and cross-device compatibility.
Collaborate with backend developers to integrate APIs and services.
Debug and resolve frontend issues efficiently.
Write clean, well-documented, and testable code.
Participate in code reviews and team discussions

title: Go lang developer
description:
Go (Golang) Developer – Job Description
Position: Go (Golang) Developer

We are looking for a skilled Go (Golang) Developer to join our engineering team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining scalable backend services, APIs, and microservices. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to build high-performance applications and contribute to the entire software development lifecycle.

Responsibilities
Design, develop, test, and maintain backend applications using Go (Golang).
Build and optimize RESTful APIs and microservices.
Write clean, efficient, and reusable code following best practices.
Integrate applications with databases, third-party APIs, and cloud services.
Troubleshoot, debug, and enhance existing applications.
Collaborate with frontend developers, product managers, and QA teams.
Participate in code reviews and technical discussions.
Ensure application performance, security, and scalability.
Create and maintain technical documentation.
requirements:
Role: Go (Golang) Developer

Experience: 1–4 Years

Skills Required:

Go (Golang)
REST APIs
Microservices
MySQL/PostgreSQL
MongoDB
Git
Docker
JWT Authentication

Responsibilities:

Develop and maintain backend services in Go.
Build scalable APIs and microservices.
Optimize application performance and database queries.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams.
Ensure code quality through testing and reviews.

Location: Remote / On-site
Employment Type: Full-time

title: Data Analyst
description:
Data Analyst – Job Description

We are looking for a Data Analyst to collect, process, and analyze data to help drive business decisions. The candidate will create reports, dashboards, and insights that support organizational growth and performance.
requirements:
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, IT, Statistics, Mathematics, or a related field.
Strong knowledge of SQL and databases.
Experience with Excel, Power BI, or Tableau.
Basic knowledge of Python or R for data analysis.
Good analytical and problem-solving skills.
Ability to interpret data and present insights clearly.
Strong communication and teamwork skills.
Preferred Skills
Data visualization and reporting.
Statistical analysis.
Data cleaning and preprocessing.
Understanding of business metrics and KPIs.

title: Software Engineer
description:
Job Description:
Design, develop, test, and maintain scalable software applications while collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality solutions.

Key Responsibilities:

Develop and maintain web applications and APIs.
Write clean, efficient, and reusable code.
Debug, test, and optimize application performance.
Collaborate with developers, QA, and product teams.
Work with databases and version control (Git).
Participate in code reviews and follow best coding practices.
Support application deployment and maintenance.
requirements:
Requirements
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
Knowledge of the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC).
Understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP).
Familiarity with REST APIs, databases, and version control (Git).
Ability to work in a collaborative Agile environment.
Skills
C++, Java, JavaScript
HTML, CSS, React.js, Next.js
Node.js, Express.js
MongoDB, MySQL
Git, GitHub, Docker, Postman
Data Structures & Algorithms (DSA)
Education
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Software Engineering, or a related field.
Experience
0–2 years of experience in software development (Freshers are encouraged to apply).
Experience with personal, academic, or internship projects is preferred.
Knowledge of full-stack web development and API integration is a plus.
